settings.welcome_editor_desc: Edit the message players see when joining the server. Use color tags to format text.
settings.diff_description: These settings will be written to the server configuration file.
settings.schedule_editor_description: Configure restart times, difficulty profiles, and their settings.
settings.restart_times_description: Server restarts at these times daily. Add or remove as needed.
settings.profiles_description: Profiles cycle through restart slots. Each profile applies different game settings.
settings.server_name_template_description: Use {mode} where the profile name should appear. Leave empty to skip.
settings.rotate_profiles_daily: Rotate profiles daily (shifts schedule by one slot each day)
settings.scope_banner_global: Showing global settings. Select a server to view server-specific settings.
settings.scope_banner_override: Unchecked fields use the primary server's settings.
settings.schedule_active_banner: Schedule is active — {{profiles}} profile(s), {{restarts}} restart time(s)
settings.schedule_inactive_banner: No schedule configured — add restart times and profiles below
settings.discover_need_sftp: Please fill in SFTP host and user first

controls.power_description: Start, stop, or restart the game server.
controls.backups_description: Create a manual backup of save files.

footer.community_panel: HumanitZ by Yodubzz Studios · Community panel

empty_states.no_schedule_configured_for_server: No schedule configured for this server
empty_states.no_clans_found: No clans found. Clans appear when players form groups in-game.
empty_states.no_tracked_items_found: No tracked items found. Items are tracked automatically from save file syncs.
empty_states.no_snapshots_yet: No snapshots yet — data records every 5 min
empty_states.select_hint: Choose a server from the dropdown above to view this content.
empty_states.map_hint: Choose a server from the dropdown above to view the live map.
empty_states.players_hint: Choose a server from the dropdown above to view the player list.
empty_states.chat_hint: Choose a server from the dropdown above to view chat history.
empty_states.activity_hint: Choose a server from the dropdown above to view the activity feed.
empty_states.timeline_hint: Choose a server from the dropdown above to view the timeline.
empty_states.items_hint: Choose a server from the dropdown above to view tracked items.

setting_descs.days_per_season: In-game days per season (4 seasons = 1 year)
setting_descs.multiplayer_sleep: All players must sleep to skip night

env_descs.discord_token: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal
env_descs.discord_client_id: Application ID from the Developer Portal
env_descs.discord_oauth_secret: OAuth2 client secret for web panel login
env_descs.discord_invite_link: Discord invite link broadcast to players in-game
env_descs.rcon_host: Game server IP or hostname for RCON connection
env_descs.game_port: Game connection port shown in status embeds
env_descs.public_host: Public IP/hostname for connect address (if different from RCON_HOST)
env_descs.server_name: Short display name for this server
env_descs.ftp_private_key_path: Path to SSH private key (optional, replaces password auth)
env_descs.ftp_base_path: Base path prefix for all SFTP file paths
env_descs.ftp_log_path: Path to HMZLog.log on the game server
env_descs.panel_channel_id: Discord channel for the bot admin panel (required)
env_descs.server_status_channel_id: Discord channel for the server status embed
env_descs.player_stats_channel_id: Discord channel for player stats embed
env_descs.activity_log_channel_id: Discord channel for the activity log feed
env_descs.bot_timezone: Timezone for daily threads and summaries (IANA format, e.g. America/New_York)
env_descs.log_timezone: Timezone the game server writes log timestamps in (default UTC)
env_descs.admin_user_ids: Comma-separated Discord user IDs with admin access
env_descs.admin_role_ids: Comma-separated Discord role IDs with admin access
env_descs.admin_alert_channel_ids: Comma-separated channel IDs for admin alerts
env_descs.admin_view_permissions: Discord permissions that grant admin view (default: Administrator)
env_descs.enable_status_channels: Voice channel dashboard showing player count and time
env_descs.enable_log_watcher: SFTP log polling and activity feed
env_descs.enable_player_stats: Player stats embed with save file data
env_descs.enable_kill_feed: Post zombie kill batches to activity thread
env_descs.enable_pvp_kill_feed: Post PvP kills to activity thread
env_descs.pvp_kill_window: Time window (ms) to attribute a kill after damage event
env_descs.death_loop_threshold: Deaths within window to trigger collapse
env_descs.death_loop_window: Time window (ms) for death loop detection
env_descs.use_chat_threads: Post chat messages in daily threads
env_descs.use_activity_threads: Post activity events in daily threads
env_descs.enable_welcome_msg: RCON welcome message on player join
env_descs.enable_pvp_scheduler: Timed PvP on/off via SFTP settings edit
env_descs.pvp_update_server_name: Append PvP status to server name
env_descs.pvp_settings_overrides: JSON: game settings applied when PvP enables
env_descs.docker_container: Docker container name for restart commands
env_descs.save_poll_interval: Save file poll interval in ms (min 60000)
env_descs.log_poll_interval: Log file poll interval in ms (min 10000)
env_descs.server_status_interval: Server status poll interval in ms (min 15000)
env_descs.enable_game_settings_editor: Game settings editor in panel channel
env_descs.ssh_port: SSH port for resource monitoring (default: FTP_PORT)
env_descs.resource_cache_ttl: Resource metrics cache TTL in ms
env_descs.agent_mode: Save parser mode: auto, agent, or direct
env_descs.agent_trigger: How to trigger agent: auto, ssh, panel, or none
env_descs.agent_node_path: Path to Node.js binary on the game server
env_descs.agent_timeout: Max wait time (ms) for agent execution
env_descs.web_map_port: Port for the web panel (default: auto)
env_descs.enable_stdin_console: Interactive stdin console for headless hosts
env_descs.stdin_console_writable: Allow stdin console to execute commands
env_descs.first_run: Run first-time setup on next start
env_descs.show_raid_stats: Show raid stats in player embeds
env_descs.show_pvp_kills: Show PvP kills in overview embed
env_descs.show_status_effects: Show status effects in player embeds
env_descs.show_connections: Show connection history in player embeds
env_descs.agent_panel_command: Panel API command to trigger agent execution
env_descs.agent_panel_delay: Delay (ms) after panel command before polling result
env_descs.auto_msg_join_check: Interval (ms) to check for new joins before sending welcome
env_descs.bot_locale: Bot display language (en, zh-TW, or zh-CN)
env_descs.enable_challenge_feed: Post challenge completion events to activity thread
env_descs.enable_companion_feed: Post companion tamed/lost events to activity thread
env_descs.enable_did_you_know: Periodic 'Did You Know' tips in chat
env_descs.enable_fishing_feed: Post fishing catches to activity thread
env_descs.enable_github_tracker: Track GitHub commits and PRs in a Discord channel
env_descs.enable_lore_feed: Post lore discovery events to activity thread
env_descs.enable_profession_feed: Post profession change events to activity thread
env_descs.enable_recipe_feed: Post recipe unlock events to activity thread
env_descs.enable_skill_feed: Post skill level-up events to activity thread
env_descs.enable_unique_feed: Post unique item discovery events to activity thread
env_descs.enable_world_event_feed: Post world events (airdrops, hordes) to activity thread
env_descs.github_channel_id: Discord channel for GitHub tracker updates
env_descs.github_repos: Comma-separated GitHub repos to track (owner/repo format)
env_descs.github_token: GitHub personal access token for API authentication
env_descs.hzmod_socket_path: Unix socket path for HZMod communication
env_descs.hzmod_status_path: File path to HZMod status JSON
env_descs.show_admin_access: Show admin access controls in player panel
env_descs.show_backpack: Show backpack contents in player inventory
env_descs.show_battery: Show battery level in status effects
env_descs.show_body_conditions: Show body conditions (bleeding, fractures) in status
env_descs.show_building_recipes: Show building recipes in player panel
env_descs.show_challenge_descriptions: Show challenge descriptions in player panel
env_descs.show_connect_count: Show total connection count in player panel
env_descs.show_containers: Show containers section in player panel
env_descs.show_crafting_recipes: Show crafting recipes in player panel
env_descs.show_equipment: Show equipped items in player inventory
env_descs.show_extended_settings: Show extended game settings in server status
env_descs.show_fatigue: Show fatigue level in status effects
env_descs.show_health: Show health bar in player vitals
env_descs.show_horses: Show horses section in player panel
env_descs.show_host_resources: Show host CPU/RAM/disk in server status
env_descs.show_hunger: Show hunger level in player vitals
env_descs.show_immunity: Show immunity level in player vitals
env_descs.show_infection_buildup: Show infection percentage in status effects
env_descs.show_loot_scarcity: Show loot rarity settings in server status
env_descs.show_most_bitten: Show most-bitten leaderboard in server status
env_descs.show_most_fish: Show most-fish-caught leaderboard in server status
env_descs.show_player_states: Show player states (bleeding, poisoned) in status
env_descs.show_pockets: Show pocket contents in player inventory
env_descs.show_quick_slots: Show quick slot items in player inventory
env_descs.show_raids_in: Show incoming raid count in player panel
env_descs.show_raids_out: Show outgoing raid count in player panel
env_descs.show_season_progress: Show season progress bar in server status
env_descs.show_server_day: Show in-game day counter in server status
env_descs.show_server_performance: Show server TPS and performance metrics
env_descs.show_server_settings: Show game settings summary in server status
env_descs.show_server_version: Show game server version in server status
env_descs.show_settings_animals: Show animals category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_bandits: Show bandits category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_building: Show building category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_companions: Show companions category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_general: Show general category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_items: Show items & loot category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_time: Show time & seasons category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_vehicles: Show vehicles category in settings grid
env_descs.show_settings_zombies: Show zombies category in settings grid
env_descs.show_stamina: Show stamina level in player vitals
env_descs.show_status_effects_admin_only: Restrict status effects section to admins
env_descs.show_thirst: Show thirst level in player vitals
env_descs.show_weather_odds: Show weather probability settings in server status
env_descs.show_weekly_stats: Show weekly stats summary in server status
env_descs.show_world_stats: Show world statistics (structures, vehicles) in server status
env_descs.status_cache_ttl: RCON status response cache TTL in ms
env_descs.status_channel_interval: Voice channel name update interval in ms
env_descs.weekly_reset_day: Day of week for weekly stats reset (0=Sun, 1=Mon ... 6=Sat)
env_descs.session_store: Session storage backend: memory, sqlite, or redis
env_descs.session_redis_url: Redis connection URL (only for redis store)
env_descs.web_map_session_secret: Secret key for signing session cookies (auto-generated if empty)

toast.settings_saved: Settings saved. Restart the bot for changes to take effect.
toast.player_not_found: Player "{{name}}" not found in player data

item_popup.not_tracked: Not yet tracked by fingerprint system

servers.no_servers_hint: Click 'Add Server' to connect your first game server.
servers.confirm_stop_msg: Are you sure you want to stop this server? All connected players will be disconnected.
servers.confirm_restart_msg: Are you sure you want to restart this server? Players will be temporarily disconnected.
servers.confirm_delete_msg: This action cannot be undone. Type the server name to confirm:
